Step 17b
⍞ Materials: Fifty Steps in Sight Singing

➜ RECAP
Review concepts from the last lesson.

➜ WARM UP
Prepare your voice for singing.
∞ Audio Link: Warm-Ups
∞ Video Link: Warm-Ups

➜ LISTEN & PRACTICE
Write, sing, or clap back melodies or rhythms as directed. Treat the ear tests like puzzles. Sing the notes in between to figure out the tricky intervals.
∞ Audio Link: Step 17b
p.19

Review Sharps, Flats, & Moveable Do

➜ RECAP
Review concepts from the last lesson.

➜ WARM UP
Prepare your voice for singing.
∞ Audio Link: Warm-Ups
∞ Video Link: Warm-Ups

➜ LISTEN & PRACTICE
∞ Video Link: L2 Lesson 3.9
After listening to the lesson, narrate it orally or in writing. Why do we need sharps and flats? What is the difference between a scale in the key of C and a scale in the key of G?

Review Identifying Keys on the Staff

➜ RECAP
Review concepts from the last lesson.

➜ WARM UP
Prepare your voice for singing.
∞ Audio Link: Warm-Ups
∞ Video Link: Warm-Ups

➜ LISTEN & PRACTICE
∞ Video Link: L2 Lesson 3.10
After listening to the lesson, flip through a hymnal or any other sheet music and practice identifying keys. Figure out the key of at least three pieces.

Review Singing Different Keys
⍞ Materials: Fifty Steps in Sight Singing

➜ RECAP
Review concepts from the last lesson.

➜ WARM UP
Prepare your voice for singing.
∞ Audio Link: Warm-Ups
∞ Video Link: Warm-Ups

➜ LISTEN & PRACTICE
∞ Video Link: L2 Lesson 3.11
After listening to the audio, sing the scale in several different keys. Then go back to Step 17a and sing through the first exercise.
∞ Video Link: Step 17a
